name: Caribou Meatloaf- Chinese Style
recipeInstructions:
1. Radish greens are good cooked as a pot herb and have a flavor similar to Chinese parsley or Cilantro.
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl.
3. Shape the mixture by hand into a loaf.
4. Place the loaf in a greased bread pan.
5. Cook in a preheated oven for 50-60 minutes until browned and juices are bubbling.
